title: What does adulting feel like?
description: If you could have a conversation with different versions of your younger self before you were an adult, how would you answer this?
author: Adulting For life

title: You can't have it all
description: But what can you have? Staying up to date is so much easier with the technology available to us, but having it so readily available can be overwhelming. You feel the pressure to stay up to date, so you don't sound "stupid" in conversations, but how often do you have to check the apps and updates, to stay relevant? Do you know if you're sacrificing something else in order to achieve this?
author: Adulting For life

title: Valentine's is coming
description: Where's your boyfriend? You are sitting at home...LONELY!
author: Adulting For life
